task: Advanced high-value task: Produce a row-level validation checklist and a constraint-aware decision memo for ore grade reconciliation using only the embedded packet provided. Perform exact-value calculations (no imputation or external data), cite the specific input values for every pass/fail, compute metal impact = tonnes*(plant_grade_pct - model_grade_pct) per row, flag any absolute grade variance > 12% as requiring geology review, evaluate remediation options against max_budget, run sensitivity checks, and deliver a completed spreadsheet (ore_reconcile_4.xlsx) and an expert memo (expert_memo.md) containing formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity analyses, and a final recommendation table. Mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
